rule: Can be shown as sample public information
example: Purpose, stage, demo agenda, public FAQ

rule: Can be shown only when labelled fake/sample
Real choices stay in private intake; demo may show aggregate or fake examples
example: Founding member now, demo first, supporter

rule: Do not store or publish in public demo, repo, screenshots, or Decidim exports
example: Email, phone, address, preferred contact method

rule: Official records only, never public sample data
example: Existing member number or previous club details

rule: Handle privately with consent and minimum necessary access
Can be summarised publicly only after consent and official confirmation
Stay in official Toastmasters process only
No card/payment details in public demo
example: Charter fee, new-member fee, dues, transfer/dual status

rule: Can be public only as an approved role, not private contact or authority claim
example: Referral partner, mentor support, host offer
